about.title: Building the Future of
about.description: Coach Connect was born from a simple observation: Portuguese football coaches lacked a dedicated, professional-grade platform to share knowledge, connect with peers, and advance their careers.
about.storyP1: Portugal produces some of the world's best football talent, yet the coaches behind this success have never had a platform that truly serves their needs. Scattered across WhatsApp groups, outdated forums, and disconnected tools — the coaching community deserved better.
about.storyP2: Coach Connect brings together three essential pillars: a Technical Hub inspired by KNVB Rinus for drills and tactical planning, a Professional Network for connecting coaches, clubs, and scouts, and a Marketplace for coaching services and career opportunities.
about.storyP3: We're building the "LinkedIn for football" — but with the tactical depth that coaches actually need.

values.excellenceDesc: We set the highest standards for football education and coaching development in Portugal.
values.communityDesc: Built by coaches, for coaches. Every feature is designed with real training needs in mind.
values.innovationDesc: Cutting-edge tools like animated tactic boards and AI-powered drill suggestions.
values.accessibilityDesc: From grassroots to professional — every coach deserves access to world-class resources.

features.title: Tools Built for
features.description: Every feature is designed around the daily workflow of football professionals — from session planning to career development.

list.exerciseLibraryDesc: Browse and share 1000+ drills organized by category (passing, shooting, tactical, etc.), age group, and difficulty. Premium members unlock advanced exercises.
list.tacticBoardDesc: Design formations, draw movement arrows, and create animated tactical sequences. Save and share your boards with your team.
list.seasonPlannerDesc: Plan weeks, months, or entire seasons. Drag-and-drop exercises into training sessions with built-in periodization support.
list.networkDesc: Build your coaching profile, connect with peers, follow clubs, and grow your professional reputation in Portuguese football.
list.messagingDesc: Instant messaging with coaches, clubs, and scouts. Share exercises, tactics, and opportunities directly.
list.jobBoardDesc: Clubs post coaching vacancies, scouts discover talent — find your next opportunity or the perfect candidate.
list.marketplaceDesc: Offer private training, video analysis, consulting, and scouting services. Built-in payments via Stripe.
list.analyticsDesc: Track profile views, engagement metrics, and see who's looking at your coaching portfolio.
list.verifiedDesc: Premium coaches get a verified badge, boosting credibility and visibility in search results.
list.matchMakerDesc: Request and organize friendly matches between teams. Auto-publishes to the national match calendar.

pricing.title: Plans That Fit Your
pricing.description: Start free, upgrade when ready. Every plan is crafted for real football professionals.

free.desc: Get started with essential coaching tools.

club.desc: Full platform access for your entire club.

footer.tagline: The technical heart of Portuguese football. Connect, learn, and grow.
